title: Law on Insolvency & Bankruptcy
description: A comprehensive guide to the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, covering corporate insolvency resolution, liquidation, and related case law. Authored by a practitioner with extensive experience in NCLT proceedings and compulsory winding‑up.
toc:
1. Overview of IBC
2. Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process
3. Liquidation Process
4. Adjudicating Authority & Appellate Tribunal
5. Offences and Penalties
…

title: Serious Fraud under the Companies Act & LLP Act
description: An in‑depth analysis of serious fraud provisions under the Companies Act, 2013 and the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008. Covers investigation, prosecution, and practical implications for professionals.
toc:
1. Introduction to Corporate Fraud
2. Companies Act Provisions
3. LLP Act Provisions
4. Investigation & Prosecution
5. Case Studies
…

title: Adjudication of Companies Act Matters under NCLT
description: A practical manual on the adjudication of various company law matters by the National Company Law Tribunal, including oppression & mismanagement, mergers, reduction of capital, and IBC. Written by a former NCLT Registrar with first‑hand experience.
toc:
1. NCLT Jurisdiction
2. Oppression & Mismanagement
3. Reduction of Capital
4. Merger & Amalgamation
5. IBC Proceedings
6. Procedural Checklists
…
